name: Rokid Manga Viewer
summary: Manga and comic ZIP reader optimized for Rokid AR glasses
description: Rokid Manga Viewer opens manga or comic ZIP files directly on Rokid AR glasses. It supports touchpad, side-tap, DPAD, and Rokid R08 Ring navigation, optional inverted colors, left-to-right reading for Western comics, spread view, and per-book reading progress.
author: vyw00741

releases.notes: - [Rokid Manga Viewer](https://github.com/vyw00741/rokid-manga-viewer) - ZIP format manga viewer optimized for Rokid AR glasses. (Note: Users need to manually upload ZIP files to/sdcard/Android/data/com.example.rokidmangaviewer/files/MangaViewer/).

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
About Rokid Manga Viewer

Rokid Manga Viewer is a glasses-native manga and comic reader for Rokid AR glasses. It reads ZIP archives directly, so books do not need to be unpacked before reading.

Key features

- Direct ZIP loading for manga and comic archives
- Touchpad, side-tap, DPAD, keyboard, media-key, and Rokid R08 Ring controls
- Inverted-color mode for high-contrast reading
- Left-to-right reading mode for Western comics and artbooks
- Single-page and spread view modes
- Automatic per-book progress saving and resume

Controls

- Book selector: swipe or use DPAD to move through books and options, then tap or press center/enter to open or toggle.
- Reader: swipe left/right or use DPAD/media keys to turn pages.
- Reader: tap or press center/enter to switch between single-page and spread view.
- Reader: double tap or press Back/Escape to return to the book list.

Setup

- Install the glasses APK and grant file/media access when prompted.
- Put `.zip` books in the app's `MangaViewer` folder. The app also checks `Documents/MangaViewer` on devices that allow legacy document access.
- ZIP entries can contain JPG, JPEG, PNG, or WebP pages; pages are naturally sorted by filename.

Notes

- This is a glasses app and does not require a phone companion.
- The APK is currently distributed as a debug build by the upstream project.
